prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-SGBRUSH-TC7410SBB-2 Product Type: GUN_CLEANING_KIT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: .410 Caliber Shotgun Cleaning Brush Phosphor Bronze Aluminum Shaft Description: Whether you're a firearms expert or just getting into shooting, you need to keep your gun clean in order to make sure it performs correctly during use. With the ASR Outdoor .410 Caliber Shotgun Cleaning Brush and regular cleaning, you can ensure that your shotgun performs well and avoids malfunctions out in the field or at the range.

This brush is made of phosphor bronze, which is ideal for general purpose, moderate-use cleaning. This material is abrasive yet gentle so it will quickly and effectively remove reside from your gun that may affect performance. It features a durable, lightweight aluminum shaft that easily screws onto most cleaning brush rods designed for shotguns. Just screw it onto your rod and you can start cleaning right away, making this a great brush to keep in your range bag for immediate use after shooting.

The phosphor bronze brush is easy to clean too - with just a toothbrush and either alcohol or a soap solution, you can easily clean your brush. Just make sure it is completely dry before your next use.

Our brush has an overall length of 3", and bristle dimensions of 1.75" x 11.5mm. This is a must-have firearm cleaning brush for any .410 caliber shotgun owner. Search Terms: shotgun cleaning brush .41 caliber aluminum gun kit shot brushes phosphor bronze firearm care kits clean Features: - .410 CALIBER CLEANING BRUSH - The ASR Outdoor shotgun cleaning brush is designed to fit standard .410 caliber shotguns. Cleaning your gun after each use will help it perform better and avoid malfunctions out in the field or at the range. - PHOSPHOR BRONZE BRUSH - Phosphor bronze brushes are great for general-purpose, moderate-use cleaning. Since it's abrasive yet gentle, the phosphor bronze brush will quickly and effectively remove residue that may affect performance. - ALUMINUM SHAFT - The durable yet lightweight aluminum shaft easily screws onto most cleaning brush rods designed for shotguns. Just screw it on to your rod and you can start removing residue right away, making this a great brush to keep in your range bag. - EASY TO CLEAN - You can easily clean your phosphor brush after you're done using it with an alcohol or soap solution and a toothbrush. Just make sure to fully dry your brush after you clean it to ensure there is no residue left before your next use. - SPECIFICATIONS - Overall brush length: 3"; Bristle dimensions: 1.75" x 11.5mm diameter; Bristle material: phosphor bronze; Bristle pitch: 5/16-27 === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor .410 Caliber Shotgun Cleaning Brush
